hero.title: Construction starts with the right decision. Make it clearly. Make it confidently.
hero.subtitle: Rasi is Saudi Arabia's digital marketplace for construction and design — connecting project owners with qualified contractors and engineers through a structured journey from project brief to professional award.
hero.intro: Choosing the right professional is the single most important decision in any construction or design project. On Rasi, you post your project with clear specifications, receive qualified offers from verified professionals, compare price, timeline, track record, and ratings on one dashboard — and award your decision through a documented workflow, instead of scattered messages and unverifiable referrals.

howItWorks.title: From brief to award — in three steps.
howItWorks.afterAward: Once awarded, your project moves from the selection phase to execution — outside Rasi's scope. After the engagement closes, you can return to rate the awarded party, contributing to a stronger market for the next project owner.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Add project details, location, service type, estimated budget, and timeline. Upload drawings or photos if available.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Offers arrive from qualified contractors or engineers. Compare price, timeline, track record, and ratings on one dashboard.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Ask questions, request clarifications, and award your decision. The contractual relationship begins directly between you and the awarded party.

trust.label: Our Foundation
trust.title: Trusted & Secure Platform
trust.verifiedProfilesDesc: Every contractor and engineer is thoroughly vetted with documented credentials, portfolio, and track record
trust.transparentTiersDesc: Clear classification with published criteria so you know exactly what each tier represents
trust.sideBySideDesc: Structured comparison tools to evaluate bids on price, timeline, experience, and ratings
trust.documentedJourneyDesc: Complete audit trail from project brief to award — every step tracked and recorded

twoSided.title: Two-Sided Snapshot
twoSided.ownersDesc: Post your project and receive qualified offers — without the random search.
twoSided.contractorsDesc: Showcase your expertise to serious projects looking for your specialty.

whyRasi.title: Why Rasi
whyRasi.constructionOnly: Construction-only — not a generic services directory
whyRasi.qualification: Qualification before competition — only verified professionals can submit offers
whyRasi.transparent: Transparent comparison — turning messages into measurable data
whyRasi.saudiMarket: Built for the Saudi market — designed around local contracting norms and regulatory context
whyRasi.microcopy: Post in minutes — no documents required to start.

ownerSection.headline: Stop searching alone. Let qualified professionals come to your project.
ownerSection.mainCopy: Whether you are building a villa, designing a space, finishing an office, renovating a home, or developing a commercial project — Rasi turns your idea into a structured project request that reaches the right contractors and engineers, and brings back comparable offers.
helpItems: Post your project in minutes, in a professional format.
Receive offers from professionals who have been verified.
Compare price, timeline, track record, and ratings on one dashboard.
Communicate with bidders inside a documented channel.
Award your decision confidently — with a clear record of the journey.
features: Manage all your projects in one place via the owner dashboard.
Receive instant notifications when new offers or updates arrive.
Access standard contract templates that help you contract with confidence.
Browse each contractor's or engineer's portfolio before deciding.
ownerSection.trustMessage: Rasi does not choose the executing party for you, does not guarantee execution outcomes, and does not monitor work quality after award. Our role is to prepare a better decision — with clearer information. You award, and you contract — we make sure you reach that moment with confidence and reliable data.

professionalSection.headline: Real projects are looking for your expertise.
professionalSection.mainCopy: If you are a licensed contractor or specialized engineer, Rasi gives you a structured channel to reach serious project owners. Instead of relying on relationships or random advertising, you build a verified professional profile and compete for the projects that match your specialty and area.
whyJoin: Access real projects with clear specifications.
A professional profile that showcases your portfolio, experience, and ratings.
Competition based on capability and record — not connections alone.
Progression across four trust tiers with transparently published criteria.
Build a measurable digital reputation in the construction sector.
Aligned with ZATCA e-invoicing and data protection standards.
professionalSection.contractorsCopy: Showcase your company, specializations, and contractor classification — and bid on execution projects within your scope. Qualification before competition means every project you see is from a serious owner.
professionalSection.engineersCopy: Whether you are an architect, interior designer, supervising engineer, or engineering office, present your specialty and bid on design, supervision, or consulting projects that match your experience.
growth: Complete your first projects on Rasi and build up your ratings.
Auto-progress to higher tiers when published criteria are met.
Establish a documented record that strengthens your candidacy for larger projects.
professionalSection.cta: Join as a Contractor or Engineer
professionalSection.microcopy: Joining requires completing your verification profile — only qualified professionals receive offers.

decisionJourney.headline: From brief to award — in three steps.
decisionJourney.step1Desc: Add project details, location, service type, estimated budget, and timeline. Upload drawings or photos if available.
decisionJourney.step2Desc: Offers arrive from qualified contractors or engineers. Compare price, timeline, track record, and ratings on one dashboard.
decisionJourney.step3Desc: Ask questions, request clarifications, and award your decision. The contractual relationship begins directly between you and the awarded party.
decisionJourney.afterAward: Once awarded, your project moves from the selection phase to execution — outside Rasi's scope. After the engagement closes, you can return to rate the awarded party, contributing to a stronger market for the next project owner.
decisionJourney.adv1Desc: Rasi is not a generic services directory or an open marketplace for every profession. Every feature — from the professional profile to the comparison dashboard — is engineered around the realities of construction, design, finishing, and renovation projects.
decisionJourney.adv2Desc: Offers appear on the platform only from professionals who have cleared profile, specialization, and experience review. Verification is the condition for entering the competition — not a marketing label awarded after sign-up.
decisionJourney.adv3Desc: We convert offers from fragmented WhatsApp conversations and phone calls into structured, comparable data on unified criteria. The decision becomes clearer, and the real differences actually surface.
decisionJourney.adv4Desc: From verification flows to communication patterns to professional classifications, Rasi is built on a real understanding of Saudi contracting norms, local contractor workflows, and the role of engineers in raising decision quality. We comply with the Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL), ZATCA e-invoicing, the E-Commerce Law, and applicable cybersecurity standards.

verificationTrust.whyCopy: Platform quality is not measured by registration counts, but by the quality of those allowed to compete. We designed a multi-stage process to raise the trust baseline, reduce decision ambiguity, and shield both sides from known operational risks.
reviewItems: Declared specialization and scope of work
Fit between professional and project type/area

whyMatters.title: Raises the trust baseline
whyMatters.desc: Every professional shown has already passed a documented review

whyMatters.title: Reduces decision ambiguity
whyMatters.desc: Owners compare verified, comparable professionals — not unknowns

whyMatters.title: Shields both sides
whyMatters.desc: Known operational risks reduced before the first offer is submitted

whoGets: Contractors — all trade types and classifications

tiers.name: Registered
tiers.desc: Completed registration and basic verification. Can browse projects and begin building a professional profile.

tiers.name: Qualified
tiers.desc: Complete profile with documented experience in declared specialty. Eligible to submit project offers.

tiers.name: Preferred
tiers.desc: Strong performance record and accumulated positive ratings. Higher visibility in search results.

tiers.name: Elite
tiers.desc: Sustained high performance, continuous commitment, and a documented track record on the platform. Highest trust level and priority in major project recommendations.

verificationTrust.noteCopy: Verification reduces randomness and improves comparison quality — but it does not guarantee execution outcomes. Contractual obligations, schedule adherence, and final work quality remain the responsibility of the awarded party.
verificationTrust.noteEmphasis: Rasi prepares the decision; it does not execute the project.

items.a: Rasi is Saudi Arabia's digital marketplace for construction and design. It connects project owners with qualified contractors and engineers, and organizes the decision journey from project posting to professional award.

No. Rasi is not a contracting company and does not execute construction work itself. Our role is to connect, verify, document, and structure the decision — the contractual relationship begins directly between the owner and the awarded party.

items.q: Does the platform monitor project execution?
items.a: No. Rasi's role ends at the moment of award. Execution, supervision, and quality assurance fall outside the platform's scope and remain the responsibility of the contracting parties.

Individuals, companies, and project-owning entities can post projects across construction, design, finishing, renovation, or commercial space development, provided they are at least 18 years old and have legal capacity.

items.q: Who can register as a service provider?
items.a: Licensed contractors, specialized engineers, and engineering offices — after completing the verification and qualification requirements relevant to the account type and specialty.

Yes. We apply a multi-stage process covering legal information, specialization, experience, and prior work. The trust level (Registered / Qualified / Preferred / Elite) is displayed on every professional profile.

items.q: Does the platform guarantee execution quality?
items.a: No. Verification, comparison, and documentation reduce risk — but execution outcomes remain the responsibility of the awarded party. This separation between the digital role and the execution role is intentional and clearly stated.

items.q: How do I choose the right offer?
items.a: Compare offers on the comparison dashboard based on: total price, timeline, professional record, prior ratings, clarity of scope, and communication quality before award.

items.q: Can I communicate with professionals before choosing?
items.a: Yes. The platform provides a structured communication channel for questions and clarifications before award — and every exchange is documented in the project context.

items.q: Can I upload drawings, photos, and files?
items.a: Yes. You can attach drawings, specifications, photos, or any files that help professionals understand the project and submit accurate offers.
Fees are published on the platform at the time of use and may change from time to time as Rasi may determine. For details, please refer to the Terms & Conditions.

items.q: How is my personal data handled?
items.a: We process your data in compliance with the Saudi Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL), and we do not share it with third parties except for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy or as required by law or formal request.

items.q: What happens if a dispute arises with the awarded party?
items.a: Execution disputes between parties are governed by their agreement and applicable Saudi laws. Rasi makes the on-platform message and document trail available as a reference tool, but is not a party to the dispute and bears no responsibility for it.

items.q: Can I withdraw my project before award?
items.a: Yes. You can withdraw your project at any time before award without obligations toward bidders, subject to any usage fees specified in the Terms.
If you are a project owner: click "Post Your Project." If you are a contractor or engineer: click "Join as a Professional" and complete your profile to reach the appropriate verification level.

partnersSection.headline: Building partnerships that raise the quality of the construction sector.
partnersSection.copy: We welcome strategic partnerships with engineering offices, qualified contractors, real estate developers, brokers, financing partners, technology providers, and construction-related service providers. Our shared goal is one: a trusted digital infrastructure that gets project owners to the right professional — and raises the efficiency of the sector as a whole.
partnersSection.who6: Training and capacity-building partners in the sector
partnersSection.why1Desc: Reach owners ready to contract — not casual browsers.
partnersSection.why2Desc: Visibility on a specialized platform that reinforces credibility.
partnersSection.why3Desc: Long-term collaboration opportunities across the construction value chain.
partnersSection.why4Desc: A direct contribution to a more transparent and organized construction market.
partnersSection.modelDesc: We respect the Saudi Competition Law and preserve strategic flexibility for both partnership sides.

contactSection.headline: Ready to start with confidence?
contactSection.copy: Whether you are a project owner looking for the right contractor or engineer, or a contractor or engineer looking for serious projects — the Rasi team is ready to guide you to the right next step. Send us a message and we will respond within one business day.
contactSection.ch4Value: Information Technology Integrated Solutions Co. — Riyadh, KSA
contactSection.fieldMessagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...
contactSection.submitSuccess: Message sent — we'll be in touch within one business day.

hero.headline: We are restructuring the moment construction decisions begin.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.headline: Digital Infrastructure for Better Construction Decisions
whoWeAre.description: Rasi is a Saudi digital platform purpose-built to connect project owners with qualified contractors and engineers across construction, design, finishing, and renovation. We believe the single most consequential moment in any project is the moment of choosing the executing party — it determines quality, cost discipline, and error rates. Rasi is the digital infrastructure that organizes that moment.

whatDelivers.title: What rasi is
whatDelivers.subtitle: A complete workflow for posting, comparing, verifying, communicating, documenting, and building trust.
summaryItems: A structured digital environment for posting projects and receiving offers from qualified parties.
Transparent comparison on one dashboard: price, timeline, track record, ratings.
A four-tier trust system with publicly published criteria: Registered, Qualified, Preferred, Elite.
Documentation of the decision journey — from brief to award.

services.title: Project Posting
services.description: We help project owners present their request professionally: project type, location, scope of work, estimated budget, timeline, and supporting files. The clearer the brief, the more accurate the offers.

services.title: Qualified Proposals
services.description: Instead of random outreach, your project reaches contractors and engineers whose specialization matches the work, so the offers you receive are worth comparing.

services.title: Structured Comparison
services.description: A unified comparison dashboard surfaces the real differences between offers: total price, timeline, track record, prior ratings, and profile completeness.

services.title: Verification & Qualification
services.description: Contractor and engineer profiles are reviewed against published criteria: legal information, specialization, prior work, and fit with the project type. Verification is the condition for competing — not a marketing label.

services.title: Structured Communication
services.description: In-platform messaging supports questions, clarifications, and detail reviews before award — all conversations are documented in the project context.

services.title: Documentation & Contracts
services.description: Tools to document scope, offers, and correspondence, plus support for clear contract drafting before execution begins. Documentation reduces disputes downstream.

services.title: Ratings & Reputation
services.description: After the engagement closes, ratings build a clear professional record for contractors and engineers — equipping future owners to make better-informed decisions.

whatIsNot.title: What Rasi Is Not
items: Does not execute construction work directly.
Does not supervise execution or monitor its quality.
Does not guarantee project outcomes — the contractual relationship remains between the owner and the awarded party.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be the most trusted digital infrastructure in Saudi Arabia for organizing the construction professional selection decision.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To enable project owners to reach qualified options, and serious contractors and engineers to reach real opportunities, through a platform founded on verification, transparency, and fair comparison.

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.description: Rasi began from a clear market reality: project owners struggling to find trustworthy professionals and falling back on personal referrals; serious contractors missing the right opportunities; and qualified engineers lacking a clean channel to display their expertise. We built Rasi not as a directory of names, but as an operating layer that converts random search into a structured decision.
ourStory.description2: We work in service of Saudi Vision 2030, which positions construction and housing as strategic priorities, and we contribute to sector efficiency through a digital tool that respects local regulations, reinforces transparency, and reduces transaction friction.
ourStory.quote: We convert random search into a structured decision.

items.title: Professionalism
items.description: Professionalism in how projects and profiles are presented.

items.title: Quality
items.description: Quality in the qualification of professionals.

items.title: Neutrality
items.description: We do not recommend a specific party; we equip the owner to choose.

items.title: Regulatory commitment
items.description: We respect Saudi laws across everything we do.

about.tagline: Rasi — Saudi Arabia's digital marketplace for construction and design. We organize the decision journey from brief to award.
